description_for_human: Pay-per-call APIs for AI agents — SEC filings, news, hiring, GitHub, package CVEs, web search, settled in USDC on Base over the x402 protocol.
description_for_model: SwarmApi exposes nine pay-per-call HTTP endpoints monetised over the x402 protocol (HTTP 402 + EIP-3009 USDC on Base mainnet). Use the @swarm-api/mcp Model Context Protocol server (npm) to make payments transparent — your agent calls tools, the server signs USDC authorizations and retries automatically. Endpoints cover SEC filings (resolve, list, extract Item-level JSON), Form 4 insider transactions, real-time company news via GDELT 2.0, public hiring boards (Greenhouse + Lever), general web search (Brave), GitHub repository health, and package metadata with OSV.dev CVE scanning. A full per-company due-diligence pass averages $0.13 USDC. Default per-request spend cap is $0.10 atomic USDC. The agent must hold a funded Base wallet with USDC.
